tool.name: OGS: ipDataToPointCloud
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'ipDataToPointCloud'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $input_file: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for ipDataToPointCloud #for $m in $input_file: --input-file "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --output-file output_1.vtu
tool.help: This tool runs the **ipDataToPointCloud** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
